channel.title: i-com
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in i-com

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Michael Koch, Claudia Müller, Susanne Boll, Volker Wulf, Albrecht Schmidt DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/icom-2024-frontmatter3

item.title: Digitalization of administrative work at home

item.title: Consideration of people’s design preferences for the development of adaptive user interfaces
item.description: Article by Michael Koch, Claudia Müller, Susanne Boll, Volker Wulf, Albrecht Schmidt DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/icom-2024-0029

item.title: Activating sustainability in the design process

item.title: People and practices must be at the center of IT research and development in a digitized world
item.description: Article by Michael Koch, Claudia Müller, Susanne Boll, Volker Wulf, Albrecht Schmidt DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/icom-2024-0061
